Tools

Drop Finder

Search items, materials, boxes and stages from the same page. Box stage ranges are inferred from the current datamined stage and box tables.

Advertisement
115Material
59Stage box
20Gear
120Stages

Source note: the current local snapshot does not include a full item loot table. Box-stage links are inferred from box family, boss state and stage level; verify rare drops in game after patches.
